productDisplayName: Nike Men's Elite Run Cus Black Orange Socks
description: CompositionBlack and orange soccer socks, made of a polyester-nylon-spandex mix fabric, with Dri-Fit and nike Swift technologies and reinforced heel and toe for enhanced durabilityFittingSnugWash care Machine wash warm in not more than 40 degrees Use non-chlorine bleach if needed Do not use softeners Tumble dry low Do not dry clean Do not iron If cushioned soccer shoes can make that difference, get an extra edge over your oppnents by slipping into these nike socks that come with three levels of cushioning to soften impact exactly where you need that protection. Made of Dri-Fit fabric, your feet remain free of sweat and fresh all day, while the nike Swift technology employed in the heel region reduces aerodynamic drag in the heel, protecting it from impact-related injuries. With specific right and left designs, these socks provide ample support to your heel and toe, pampering your feet to the hilt. Team these with soccer shoes when on the field, and with jeans or skirts for that cool, casual look.
